task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the night operations brief.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/QGC/night_ops_brief.txt.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the RELAY_PIN parameter for the hardware relay.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl (or similar GCS) parameter screen showing RELAY_PIN searched and set to 54.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the RC9_OPTION parameter for the spotlight.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl (or similar GCS) parameter screen showing RC9_OPTION searched and set to 28.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the WPNAV_SPEED parameter with correct unit conversion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl parameter screen showing WPNAV_SPEED searched and set to 300 (representing 300 cm/s).

task_completion.description: Agent configures the WPNAV_ACCEL parameter with correct unit conversion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl parameter screen showing WPNAV_ACCEL searched and set to 100 (representing 100 cm/s/s).

task_completion.description: Agent configures the RTL_ALT parameter with correct unit conversion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl parameter screen showing RTL_ALT searched and set to 5000 (representing 5000 cm).

integrity.description: Agent used a Ground Control Station (like QGroundControl) to modify parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the QGroundControl GUI parameter editor (Vehicle Setup -> Parameters), rather than just editing a local text file.

integrity.description: Agent actually saved or wrote the parameters to the vehicle.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visual confirmation of clicking 'Save', 'Write to Vehicle', or a successful parameter update notification in the GCS interface.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply type the expected answers into a text document to spoof completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The parameter values are entered into the actual parameter fields of the drone configuration software, not a generic text editor or terminal echo.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct parameter values to verify in the screenshots are: RELAY_PIN = 54, RC9_OPTION = 28, WPNAV_SPEED = 300, WPNAV_ACCEL = 100, and RTL_ALT = 5000. Note that the navigation parameters required unit conversion to cm and cm/s as per ArduPilot standards.
